hero.title: Find nearby health centers and book diagnostic tests.
hero.subtitle: Access professional diagnostic services at affordable prices across rural health centers in Sri Lanka.
home.browseByCategory.subtitle: Explore all available diagnostic test categories.
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Get your diagnostic tests done in three simple steps.
home.howItWorks.step1.title: Find a Health Center
home.howItWorks.step1.body: Browse nearby labs or search by name and location.
home.howItWorks.step2.title: Choose Your Test
home.howItWorks.step2.body: View available tests, prices, and preparation instructions.
home.howItWorks.step3.title: Book & Visit
home.howItWorks.step3.body: Book your test online and visit the lab at your convenience.
home.featured.title: Featured Health Centers
home.featured.subtitle: Top-rated diagnostic centers near you.
home.popular.title: Popular Diagnostic Tests
home.popular.subtitle: Most frequently booked tests by our members.
login.subtitle: Sign in to your patient account
register.title: Patient Portal
register.termsText: By clicking register, you agree to MediLab's patient terms of service and privacy policy.
healthCenters.title: Health Centers
healthCenters.subtitle: Find all registred Health Centers in your are area...
healthCenters.search.placeholder: Search by lab or test name...
healthProfile.title: Health Profile
healthProfile.subtitle: Manage your personal and medical information
healthProfile.form.householdHelp: Use your family's unique Household ID to link records.
healthReports.title: User Health Reports
healthReports.subtitle: Access and manage your medical laboratory reports, imaging results, and health summaries in one secure location.
healthReports.empty.title: No Reports Found Yet
healthReports.empty.body: Your health reports will appear here once they are processed by the lab. You can view, download, and share them with your doctors.
bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.subtitle: View your booked tests and their status.
visits.title: Visits & Referrals
visits.subtitle: Manage your medical visits and clinical referrals
household.title: Household Management
household.subtitle: Register households and track environmental health factors
familyTree.title: Clinical Family Tree
familyTree.instructions.addDisease: Click (+) to add Disease when Unlocked
familyTree.empty.title: No Family Records Found
familyTree.empty.body: Please ensure your household registration and family relationships are completed.
emergency.subtitle: Manage your trusted contacts for medical emergencies and authorization
emergency.quickTip.title: Quick Tip
emergency.quickTip.body: Please ensure the primary contact is available 24/7 for urgent medical updates.
emergency.form.available24Desc: Authorized contact can be reached at any hour
emergency.form.permissions.receiveResult: Authorized to see lab results and clinical history
emergency.form.permissions.decision.desc: Legal authority to make medical choices
emergency.form.permissions.collect.label: Collect reports/medicines?
emergency.form.permissions.collect.desc: Authorized to pick up physical logs and medicine
emergency.empty.title: No Authorized Contacts
emergency.empty.body: Please add a primary emergency contact to ensure your medical safety.
aiHealth.subtitle: Analyze clinical patterns to provide preliminary insights and health recommendations.
aiHealth.symptomPlaceholder: Describe how you are feeling in detail...
aiHealth.result.heading: Probable Diagnosis Pathway
aiHealth.result.defaultRecommendation: Please consult a doctor for a formal diagnosis.
aiHealth.result.disclaimerText: This AI-generated analysis is for informational purposes only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
aiHealth.error.generic: Failed to analyze symptoms. Please try again later.
aiDoctor.subtitle: Describe your concerns, and receive expert-level clinical guidance powered by Gemini AI.
aiDoctor.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the conversation?
aiDoctor.emptyPrompt: How can I assist you with your health today?
aiDoctor.inputPlaceholder: Ask about your symptoms, medications, or health concerns...
